archetype: Artisan Elegance (Custom blend of Pastel & Soft + Luxury)

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Apply tracking-tight for sizes above 32px.

body.usage: Use for all body text, UI elements, buttons, and form inputs.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Sections should feel like a high-end art gallery. Use p-12 to p-24 for section paddings.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use the Tetris Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) for category showcasing. Overlap images with text slightly for an editorial look.

ui_components.buttons: Primary CTA should be solid Obsidian/White with a subtle gold hover state (hover:bg-[#C5A059] hover:text-white). No pill shapes, use standard rounded-md.
ui_components.cards: For products, use cardless designs. Just an image and text below. Do not wrap products in generic white cards.
ui_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 in light mode, with a delicate 1px border-b of border-black/5.
ui_components.animations: Smooth scroll with lenis. Staggered fade-up for product grids using framer-motion.

images.description: Abstract white and brown pastel marble texture, perfect for the hero background to convey liquid resin flowing.
Gold necklaces, representing personalized luxury jewelry.
Elegant personalized cufflinks in a wooden box.
Gold heart necklace on pink satin, great for romantic gifts category.
Hands crafting resin art, perfect for the About Bhavin Creations section.
White background with pink and blue paint, great for a banner or custom order section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts via fontsource or google fonts: Playfair Display and Outfit.
Implement a theme toggle (Light/Dark). Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA standards.
Do not use generic 'Inter' anywhere. Do not use standard Shadcn cards for product display; build a custom cardless gallery grid.
Implement the 'Developed by RK Technologies' in the footer along with the tagline 'Crafting Digital Experiences, Just Like Bhavin Creates Art.'
Use Framer Motion for scroll-reveals (e.g. while scrolling through products).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Admin panel should use a dense 'Control Room' grid with Shadcn components, contrasting with the airy storefront.
Ensure hover states explicitly change text colors when background colors change.
Include a floating WhatsApp click-to-chat button (use a subtle glowing effect).
